English Studies

Mourad Project's

© 2025 All rights reserved.

Ok but... why English Studies?

English Studies is more than just a website. It's a student community built to make university life simpler, faster, and more connected.

With features like Course Materials, Updates, Timetables, Old Exams, Grade Calculator, AI Assistant, Student Resources, Events, and much more, English Studies brings everything together in one place.

Behind every download, every update, and every visit is a real student looking for the right information at the right time. That has always been the goal.

It's the place where you can stay updated, find the resources you need, prepare for your exams, and connect with your academic journey without wasting time searching through different platforms.

Whether you're a first-year student trying to find your way or someone preparing for final exams, English Studies gives you the space and the tools to succeed.

Explore the platform, discover new resources, access your courses, check the latest updates, and make the most of your university experience.

Built by students, for students, English Studies is designed to support every step of your academic journey.

Student Space

Community links and resources for your group

About Us

Our Story,
Our Service

English Studies Portal is built to make student life easier by providing unlimited access to everything you need — in one modern space.

Our Story

How we started?

It all started when lots of students had a hard time finding their lesson files, so Mourad decided to help out and put everything together in Google Classroom. Everyone loved the idea and it grew really fast. But then we hit a big problem: Google Classroom has a limit of 248 students, which meant a lot of people couldn't join and see the lessons.

We needed a better way so everyone could access the files without any limits. Mourad started working on his ideas and coded a brand new website just for us. Today, the site you see is the result of all that work. It keeps growing and getting better to help students.

14+Modules
2Semester
1Group

Our Goal

Our ultimate objective is to ensure that everyone finds exactly what they are looking for. We aim to provide all the necessary lessons and resources, along with a comprehensive range of tools and options designed to support every student's success.

Services

We are always at your service and strive to meet your highest expectations. Our commitment is to provide quality work and continuous support that will remain available until the very end of the academic year.

Trust

We operate on a foundation of mutual respect and integrity. As fellow students, our primary focus is to support one another; we would never take any unfair actions or withhold valuable information that could benefit the community.
